name: engineering-tutorial
description: Step-by-step walkthrough for software engineering practice on VS Code, aligned with this repo's education/README.md syllabus.

commands.title: SE Tutorial: Open Code - OSS overview
SE Tutorial: Open pull request template
SE Tutorial: Open architecture / Copilot instructions

walkthroughs.title: Software engineering on VS Code (open collaboration tour)
walkthroughs.description: Follow the same path as education/README.md: community, GitHub workflows, architecture, sessions, extensions, and tooling—plus everyday VS Code practices.

steps.title: How to use this tutorial
steps.description:
Open this repository as a VS Code folder, then use the links in each step. Shortcuts appear in the Command Palette under **SE Tutorial:**.
[Open syllabus in editor](command:engineeringTutorial.openSyllabus)
[Preview syllabus as rendered Markdown](command:engineeringTutorial.previewSyllabus)

steps.title: 1. Open source community
steps.description:
Understand Code - OSS vs the VS Code product, then read how contributions are expected.
[Open overview](command:engineeringTutorial.openCodeOssOverview)
[Open CONTRIBUTING](command:engineeringTutorial.openContributing)
[Preview overview (Markdown)](command:engineeringTutorial.previewCodeOssOverview)
[Preview CONTRIBUTING (Markdown)](command:engineeringTutorial.previewContributing)

steps.title: 2. Collaboration on GitHub
steps.description:
Structured issues and pull requests are how large teams stay aligned.
[Open PR template](command:engineeringTutorial.openPullRequestTemplate)
[Preview PR template (Markdown)](command:engineeringTutorial.previewPullRequestTemplate)

steps.title: 3. Architecture & Extension API
steps.description:
See how the editor is layered and where extensions fit.
[Open Copilot / architecture instructions](command:engineeringTutorial.openCopilotInstructions)
[Preview architecture doc (Markdown)](command:engineeringTutorial.previewCopilotInstructions)

steps.title: 4. Sessions, chat & agents
steps.description:
Modern VS Code adds agentic workflows on top of the workbench.
[Open sessions README](command:engineeringTutorial.openSessionsReadme)
[Preview sessions README (Markdown)](command:engineeringTutorial.previewSessionsReadme)

steps.title: 5. Bundled extensions ecosystem
steps.description:
First-party extensions ship beside the core—same packaging model as your own extensions.
[Open extensions CONTRIBUTING](command:engineeringTutorial.openBundledExtensionsContributing)
[Preview extensions CONTRIBUTING (Markdown)](command:engineeringTutorial.previewBundledExtensionsContributing)

steps.title: 6. Engineering tooling
steps.description:
Containers, tests, and automation scripts mirror professional practice.
[Open dev container README](command:engineeringTutorial.openDevcontainerReadme)
[Preview dev container README (Markdown)](command:engineeringTutorial.previewDevcontainerReadme)

steps.title: 7. Daily software engineering in VS Code
steps.description:
Apply the tour: Git, Problems, Tasks, Search, and the Command Palette.
[Preview this step as Markdown](command:engineeringTutorial.previewWalkthroughDailyPractices)

steps.title: 8. Wrap up & next steps
steps.description:
Re-open the walkthrough anytime from the Command Palette.
[Open this walkthrough](command:engineeringTutorial.openThisWalkthrough)
[Open syllabus](command:engineeringTutorial.openSyllabus)
[Preview syllabus (Markdown)](command:engineeringTutorial.previewSyllabus)
